description: Style Note Being fashionable means being able to combine the right amount of comfort with a bucket load of style in your outfit. Wranger goes charming and cute with this comfortable tank top. Pair it with your favourite pair of jeans and flip flops and accessorise subtly. Product Details A white top with a tiny dark blue print scattered all over, a round neck with folds around the neckline, elasticated stiches at the yoke to give a pleated effect, short sleeves Material and Care Vortex viscose Hand wash cold using a mild detergent inside out with like colours Do not bleach Do not iron on print or embellishments Do not tumble dry or wring Flat dry in shade inside out Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
